title: KAOS Artifact Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.json files in the KAOS Agentic Artifact Registry. Every artifact exists to produce or feed structured knowledge into the KAOS RAG pipeline.

type.description: Artifact type. Determines the expected entry file format (SKILL.md, AGENT.md, PROMPT.md).

entry.description: Entry file relative to the artifact directory.

description.description: One-line description of what this artifact does.

chunk_types.description: Knowledge chunk types this artifact generates for the RAG extraction pipeline (e.g. architectural-decision, constraint, acceptance-criterion).

label.description: GitHub issue label that triggers the Argo Workflow extraction pipeline (e.g. PRD).

output_path.description: Where structured output is written (e.g. knowledge/prds/).

produces.description: What structured knowledge this artifact produces for the KAOS knowledge base. This is the core of the flywheel — skills and agents capture human decisions, the pipeline vectorizes them, future agents query them.

chunk_types.description: Knowledge chunk types this artifact queries from the RAG pipeline at runtime.

tools.description: MCP tools this artifact calls (e.g. kaos:schema, kaos:knowledge, kaos:list).

consumes.description: What knowledge and tools this artifact needs at runtime.

dependencies.description: Dependencies on other artifacts in the registry.
